name: 1Password Connect
description: 1Password Connect provides programmatic access to your 1Password vaults and secrets. Use this API to retrieve, create, and manage vault items like passwords, API keys, and secure notes from your applications.

capabilities.name: list_vaults
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all vaults accessible to your Connect server.

capabilities.name: list_items
capabilities.description: List all items in a specific vault.

capabilities.name: get_item
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific item including its fields and secrets.

capabilities.name: create_item
capabilities.description: Create a new item in a vault (password, API key, secure note, etc.).

capabilities.name: update_item
capabilities.description: Update an existing item's fields and metadata.
